"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\libglew_shared.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\libglew_shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\libglew_shared.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -lmingw32 -lgdi32 -luser32 -lkernel32 -ladvapi32 -lshell32 -lgcc -lmoldname -lmingwex -lmsvcrt -lwinspool -lcomdlg32 -lole32 -loleaut32 -luuid -lodbc32 -lodbccp32 -nostdlib -shared -o bin\libglew-shared.dll -Wl,--out-implib,lib\libglew-shared.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,2,--minor-image-version,2 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\libglew_shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\libglew_shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
